label: Fixture Detail
description: Match stats, timeline, odds movement chart, and trade panel for the selected fixture.

l0.notes: 0.1 WidgetErrorBoundary present in widget-wrapper.tsx. 0.2 requiredEntitlements=["sports-trading"]. 0.3 availableOn=["sports"]. 0.4 No any/ts-ignore. 0.5 No direct mock imports. 0.6 No async loading path (synchronous selection from context). 0.7 No-selection empty state: dashed border placeholder with guidance text. 0.8 No error path in context. 0.9 No dead code.

l1.notes: 1.1 Data via useSportsData().selectedFixture — no inline fetch. 1.2 Context reads useGlobalScope(). 1.3 Org filter affects bets shown in trade panel via hasSportsDesk; fixture display is scope-agnostic (public event data). 1.4 N/A — no client scope for fixtures. 1.5 N/A — strategy filter not applicable. 1.6 Empty scope = all fixtures visible. 1.7 No reference data in widget file.
